title: My Pop Rock Metallic Pink Mix Bluish Green Super Star Backpack
features: Unique design by William Lamb based in the UK
Backpack is suitable for books, toys, mobile phone, tablet, or any fun items when going for leisure walking, picnics or most travel occasions
Features twin adjustable shoulder straps and a carry handle. The bag has a large zip compartment for easy access and a smaller zip fastening pocket
Good for School Books or Clothing
description: My Pop Rock Backpack is a fabulous gift for any Pop Rock fan. The Backpack has a slight change in colour from different viewpoints. The Backpack will be great to store clothing, school stuff or any fun accessories. Bag is easy to carry and made to high quality standards. Be sure to see a smile on your little girl's face when she gets her My Pop Rock Backpack
